calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Continued To Apr-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator. Richard Ng for Fact Finders (Petitioners). David Owens for Joan Dunnigan.

Mr. Owens stated the matter was concluded based on the heirship order. Mr. Ng stated that he filed his objection and that he wanted to be included in the distribution. Mr. Ferdon stated that he just saw the objection yesterday, that the proof of service was dated March 12, 2008, and that he was ready to make distribution. The matter was continued to April 9, 2008 for the Court's further review.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Bonner.

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: David Owens appearing for petitioner. Carrie Moulton appearing for Thelma Lewis Lazzari. Robert Turner appearing for Turner family. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Administrator. Mr. Turner is in pro per. He argued that equitable adoption exists for his mother and Enrico and Celia Rosaia. He does not have any evidence on their intent to adopt her. Court finds that euitable adoption does not exist. The issue on Jane Tomklins Keefe and Joseph Thompkins have not filed any statement of interest addressed. Mr. Owens is willing to stipulate to include them in the order. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Stella Pantazis. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
